/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=Cortex-M3 -std=gnu11   --specs=nano.specs -mthumb -Wall -g -T../STM32F103C8TX_FLASH.ld --specs=nosys.specs -Wl,-Map=test.map -Wl,--gc-sections -static -Wl,--start-group -lc -lm -Wl,--end-group CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Startup/startup_stm32f103c8tx.s.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Sources/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Sources/sensor_gas.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Sources/system_stm32f1xx.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Sources/syscalls.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Sources/sysmem.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_rcc.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_rcc_ex.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_gpio.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_adc.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_adc_ex.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_uart.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_dma.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_cortex.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_flash.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_flash_ex.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_pwr.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_tim.c.obj CMakeFiles/PROJETOF_gas.dir/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_tim_ex.c.obj -o PROJETOF_gas.elf
